name: Brambles Limited
analysis: BXB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$19.5800, stop A$17.2458, target A$22.2200 (1.13:1) — then trail it.
